Lancet Colour Palette

Source: R/color.R
pal_lancet.Rd

A 15-colour palette inspired by The Lancet journal style, suitable for categorical data visualisation.

Usage

pal_lancet

Format

A palette object (character vector of 15 hex colour codes). Printing in the console displays coloured swatches automatically.

See also

Other colour palettes: as_palette(), pal_get(), pal_list(), pal_other, pal_show()

Examples

pal_lancet
#>  #00468B   #ED0000   #42B540   #0099B4   #925E9F   #FDAF91   #AD002A   #ADB6B6   #1B1919   #79AF97   #DF8F44   #6A6599   #FCCDE5   #80B1D3   #0000FF  
pal_lancet[1:5]
#>  #00468B   #ED0000   #42B540   #0099B4   #925E9F
